name: Meridian Corp
business: Meridian Corp is a bank holding company that provides commercial banking, mortgage banking, and wealth management services to small and middle market businesses, professionals, and retail customers in the Delaware Valley tri-state market, Central Maryland, and southwest Florida.

exposures.sentence: Technological changes, including the rise of AI as a commonly used resource.

The occurrence of fraudulent activity, breaches or failures of our information security controls or cybersecurity-related incidents could have a material adverse effect on our business, financial condition or results of operations.
